projects.name: Resyntha
projects.description: Multi-Agent Research Intelligence Platform automating literature review, knowledge extraction, and research landscape generation
keyArchitectures: Stage-based pipeline engine with deterministic validation
Multi-agent orchestration for coordinated research tasks
Asynchronous execution via ARQ and Redis queue
Versioned artifact storage with rollback support
challenges: Building a stage-based pipeline engine with validation between stages
Managing async task execution with queue backpressure
Orchestrating multi-agent coordination without duplicated work
Implementing caching strategies across API sources
learnings: Pipeline architecture design and asynchronous orchestration
Building observability into distributed data workflows

projects.name: Atlas
projects.description: Production-grade RAG platform with OCR pipeline, pgvector semantic search, streaming responses, and citation-aware AI
keyArchitectures: Modular backend with independent ingestion, retrieval, generation, and auth services
OCR pipeline for document normalization and extraction
challenges: Designing modular architecture with independently scalable services
Building OCR pipeline handling diverse document formats
Implementing hybrid search for optimal retrieval relevance
Streaming citation-grounded responses within context windows
learnings: RAG architecture patterns and embedding strategies
Streaming response design for AI systems

projects.name: Engineering Portfolio Website
projects.description: This portfolio: React frontend + Express backend with AI assistant, LeetCode telemetry, and AI integration
challenges: Balancing rich UI with minimal overhead
Managing async state and loading states

projects.name: SUMS - Smart University Management System
projects.description: Enterprise-scale backend system for managing academic and placement workflows at a university
challenges: Designing normalized schema to avoid data anomalies
Implementing transaction handling for concurrent operations
Managing role-based permissions across multiple entities

projects.name: School Management API
projects.description: Express.js backend API for managing school data with geolocation-based features
